title: Count HTTP Status Codes
description:
Parse an Nginx/Apache access log. The HTTP status code follows the closing quote of the request field.

Return each status code and its count, one per line as `code count`, sorted by code ascending.

Return an empty string for empty input.
constraints: Input is a plain string passed to solve(input string) string
Return a string matching the expected output exactly
Return empty string where the problem specifies no results

examples.explanation: See test case: Mixed status codes
